scene.setting: Steampunk Paris, 1941. A polluted city of smokestacks, iron cable car towers, and steam-powered vehicles. No trees, no electricity. The sky is grey with soot.
scene.imagePrefix: Steampunk Paris panorama, smoky grey sky, iron bridges and cable car towers, coal-powered vehicles, no vegetation, Victorian-era architecture

sentences.imagePrompt: Wide shot, eye-level, of a massive iron bridge spanning the Seine in steampunk Paris 1941, the bridge dominating the center of the frame with grey polluted water below and smokestacks lining the riverbanks. The distant sea glimmers faintly under an overcast grey sky with diffused daylight.
sentences.speaker: Avril

sentences.text: C'est le pont ! C'est la mer !
sentences.speaker: Avril

sentences.imagePrompt: Close-up, eye-level, of a worn leather steampunk hat with brass goggles resting prominently on a scarred wooden table inside a soot-covered house. A small oil lamp beside the hat casts warm amber light, the dark walls of the cramped room fading into shadow behind.
sentences.speaker: Avril

sentences.text: Voilà le chapeau ! Voilà la maison !
sentences.speaker: Avril

sentences.text: C'est un chapeau. C'est la mer.
sentences.speaker: Avril

sentences.imagePrompt: Medium shot, eye-level, of Avril facing the viewer in the doorway of a soot-covered steampunk house, her wild red hair framing her determined face, brass goggles pushed up on her forehead. Grey daylight from the polluted Paris street behind her silhouettes the doorframe, mood gritty and resolute.
sentences.speaker: Avril

sentences.imagePrompt: Medium shot, eye-level, of Darwin the grey cat sitting upright on a windowsill facing the viewer, his intelligent yellow eyes prominent and alert. Behind him a narrow steampunk alley recedes into haze, grey daylight filtering through the smog, mood quiet and watchful.
sentences.speaker: Darwin

sentences.imagePrompt: Medium shot, eye-level, of Pops the elderly grandfather facing the viewer in the doorway of the steampunk house, his wild white hair and threadbare lab coat clearly visible. Warm oil-lamp glow spills from inside behind him, contrasting with the grey polluted street light, mood gentle and weary.
sentences.speaker: Pops

sentences.imagePrompt: Medium shot, eye-level, of Avril and Pops standing side by side facing the viewer on a steampunk Paris rooftop, Avril's smooth youthful face contrasting sharply with Pops' deeply lined weathered face. Smokestacks and grey haze fill the background, soft diffused daylight, mood bittersweet and reflective.
sentences.speaker: Avril
